incident_reconstruction.reconstruction: The vehicle was involved in a frontal collision with another vehicle or object. The damage pattern suggests a high-energy impact, likely at a significant speed. The front bumper, bonnet, and headlights show severe damage, indicating a substantial force was applied to the front of the vehicle.
reconstruction_bullets: The damage to the front bumper, bonnet, and headlights is consistent with a high-speed frontal collision.
The severity of the damage suggests that the impact was likely with a large vehicle or at a significant speed.
The lack of damage to other parts of the vehicle suggests that the impact was primarily frontal.

storyboard_panels.title: Pre-Incident
storyboard_panels.description: The Kia Seltos was driving on a road near Perungudi when it was hit by another vehicle coming from the wrong side.

storyboard_panels.title: Point of Impact
storyboard_panels.description: The vehicle was struck directly on the front, causing severe damage to the bumper, bonnet, and headlights.

storyboard_panels.title: Immediate Aftermath
storyboard_panels.description: The vehicle was severely damaged, with the bonnet crumpled and the front bumper detached.

storyboard_panels.title: Evidence Summary
storyboard_panels.description: The physical evidence suggests a high-energy frontal collision, consistent with the claimant's story of being hit by another vehicle.
